creator: jumper99@gmx.de
text:
www/typo3 is always the most current version, it will become 4.6 when Typo3 
4.6 was released in October. I want to enable users to stay at 4.5 if 
necessary. This is what www/typo345 was repocopied for.

Typo3 supports 3 versions, see http://typo3.org/download/packages/
